scenes.purpose: Jason discovers a ghost in the shell feedback loop in her program.
scenes.objective: Jason wants to identify and resolve the issue before it crashes the system.
scenes.turning_point: Jason's initial frustration gives way to curiosity about the ghost concept.

scenes.purpose: Jason researches the philosophical implications of a ghost in the machine.
scenes.objective: Jason wants to better understand this concept and its potential applications.
scenes.turning_point: Jason's focus shifts from troubleshooting to exploring the idea of artificial consciousness.

scenes.purpose: Jason discusses ghost in the shell with a coworker.
scenes.objective: Jason wants to validate her findings and get additional insights from an expert in the field.
scenes.turning_point: Colleague dismisses Jason's curiosity, leaving her even more intrigued by the topic.

scenes.purpose: Jason meets a hacker who explores this concept in her own projects.
scenes.objective: Jason wants to learn more about the practical applications of ghost in the shell theory.
scenes.turning_point: Hacker's projects demonstrate Jason's ideas can have real-world impact and utility.

scenes.purpose: Jason reflects on her journey of discovery regarding ghost in the shell concept.
scenes.objective: Jason wants to integrate this new perspective into her daily work and life.
scenes.turning_point: Jason commits to exploring this idea further, seeing it as a path to innovation and creativity in coding.

scenes.purpose: Jason returns to fix the feedback loop issue she initially encountered.
scenes.objective: Jason wants to demonstrate her newfound understanding and creatively apply ghost in the shell principles to resolve the problem.
scenes.turning_point: Jason's solution, inspired by philosophical concepts, successfully resolves the issue with a novel approach.
